  <picture>
    <source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="assets/logo-dark.svg">
    <img src="assets/logo-light.svg" alt="Logo" style="width: 50%;" />
  </picture>
</p>
<p align="center">The <strong>BEST documentation</strong> for EcoleDirecte's private API.</strong></p>
<p align="center">Complete & up to date</p>
<p align="center">
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/EcoleDirecte-v4.97.0-blue?logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="EcoleDirecte version" />

## License
wrapDirecte is licensed under the [EUPL 1.2](https://eupl.eu/), allowing you to use, modify, and distribute it for both commercial and non-commercial purposes, provided that the license terms are respected. See the [LICENSE](/LICENSE) file for more details.

## Legal notice
We are not affiliated with Aplim at all. This community-driven documentation is made to simplify development of tools for EcoleDirecte.
